description: The importance or worth attributed to something; what matters. 'Wone' names what we hold precious—the recognition of significance.
sound_symbolism: The word sustains worth. 'So' begins with warm energy, the enduring radiance of something that matters. 'Ne' settles with clarity. Value as sustaining force, not assigned but inherent.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo sone' (the value). As verb: 'mi sone' (I value). Related to 'rolia' (worth) as attributed versus inherent.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Values as compass—what we value shapes what futures we build.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Examining values—investigating what we hold dear and why.
